title: ProjectJJK
description: The Jujutsu Kaisen Mod for Fabric
body:
Embark on a Mystical Journey with the new 'Jujutsu Kaisen' Minecraft Mod


Dive into the enchanting world of 'Jujutsu Kaisen' with ProjectJJK, a mod for Minecraft that masterfully combines the thrilling elements of the beloved anime with the classic charm of Minecraft. This mod not only promises an adventure-rich experience but also brings a unique twist to your Minecraft gameplay.

## Copyright Notice All assets included in this mod are protected under an All Rights Reserved License. Unless explicitly stated otherwise, users are not permitted to claim, redistribute, or use these assets as their own intellectual property. However, permission is granted for the use of these assets in the creation of thumbnails for videos that are specifically related to this mod. This allowance is intended to support content creators in showcasing the mod, provided that the use of these assets does not imply ownership or copyright infringement. Most sound effects are from Pixabay, and special thanks to SoundwaveofBC for the curse spirit sound effects! By downloading and using this mod, you acknowledge and agree to these terms. ## Features (currently) - **Three Cursed Techniques:** Choose from Limitless, Cursed Speech, and Boogie Woogie, each offering a distinct playstyle. - **Rank Up System:** Exorcise cursed spirits and ascend through the ranks, unlocking powerful new techniques. - **Skill-Based Combat:** Engage in combat that rewards player skill and strategy. - **Ritual Boxes:** Open these to cleanse the world of negative energy. - **Cursed Doors:** Unlock these with special keys to battle against formidable spirits. - **Flexible Ability Customization:** Craft your unique combat style by selecting and fine-tuning abilities to match your preferred way of playing. This dynamic system allows for personalized strategies, ensuring that no two players' experiences are the same. **(More Abilities will be added for a proper customizable experience)** - **Ongoing Updates:** Exciting new features are continuously being added! ### Cursed Spirits ![Cursed Spirits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c8eb7e18bc6426b8101f644e817899190e5330d.png) ### Technique Selection ![Technique Selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dafe88c5ca568f56adc0d4c7423413323a92ea25.png) ### Technique Inventory ![Technique Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9054a64580715f42932cff28d1506061233f425.png) ## Design Philosophy - My aim is to provide a balanced gameplay experience where choice and skill reign supreme. Each cursed technique is designed to cater to different playstyles, encouraging players to find their niche rather than chasing the "strongest" option. For example, mastering **Limitless** requires keen _cursed energy management_ for higher damage output, while **Boogie Woogie** offers different _strategic advantages_. This approach mirrors the dynamic seen in games like League of Legends, where player proficiency significantly influences outcomes. - _In simpler terms, while a bad Limitless user can be beaten by a great Boogie Woogie user, when it comes down to both skilled players, Limitless will win because its a matter of who counters who and what items counter what. (counter Limitless with nullifying techniques)_ ## Installation - Requires the recommended [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) version for your Minecraft version (**greater than 0.14.25!**) - Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Requires [SpecterLib](https://github.com/hadences/SpecterReleases/releases/tag/v0.1.6) - Place Fabric API, SpecterLib and the ProjectJJK mod file in your Minecraft 'mods' folder. - Launch Minecraft and embark on your new adventure! ## Compatability - **Known Issues:** At present, the only identified conflict is with the Entity Culling Mod, which may affect gameplay when used alongside ProjectJJK. - **Your Input Matters:** I strive to make ProjectJJK compatible with as many mods as possible. If you encounter any compatibility issues with other mods, I would love to hear from you! Your feedback is invaluable in helping me improve. Please share your experiences and findings on my Discord server. ## FAQ ### Forge? > No. I will not be porting this mod to Forge. While I do have plans on possibly moving to NeoForge in the future, this project will remain in Fabric. ### Will you be adding ___? > This mod seeks to add all the content of Jujutsu Kaisen into Minecraft and will eventually be added sooner or later. (Please refrain from asking to add "Strong" Cursed Techniques because they'll be added) ### ___ isn't accurate to JJK! > My goal is to faithfully capture the essence of Jujutsu Kaisen in this mod. However, maintaining a perfect alignment with the anime's storyline can sometimes hinder the gaming experience. To ensure a seamless and enjoyable gameplay, I occasionally prioritize playability over strict adherence to the source material. This balance is key to providing both an authentic and fun experience. ### Limitless is still too strong compared to the rest! > Until more abilities are added, there will be balancing issues for the first few updates. Overtime, when more techniques and cursed tools are added, the balancing aspect will be effective.
